h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to follow the tutor's instructions to identify the functions of the numbers in the time signature.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: writes 3/8 below the bar, then puts the quarter-note card back over the lower box
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner successfully writes the correct time signature 3/8 and manipulates the cards to demonstrate understanding of the beat unit.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: There is no breakdown or resistance from the learner that triggers a tutor strategy reversal.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to adapt to.

learner_actional_breakthrough.evidence: writes 3/8 below the bar, then puts the quarter-note card back over the lower box
learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner successfully writes the correct time signature 3/8 and manipulates the cards to demonstrate understanding of the beat unit.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to adapt to.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: There is no breakdown or resistance from the learner that triggers a tutor strategy reversal.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: There is no breakdown or resistance from the learner that triggers a tutor strategy reversal.

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to apply the rule of naming the acting object before placing the card and determining the arrow direction.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: Object first: track on cart, if this is the upward push. Then the arrow direction is up. If this slot is the down arrow, it is Earth on cart instead.
scored.actionalBreakthroughJustification: The learner successfully applies the rule to identify and classify the vertical forces acting on the cart (track on cart and Earth on cart).
scored.tutorReversalJustification: There is no learner resistance or breakdown that triggers a tutor strategy reversal.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn, so there is no recognition-contingent tutor uptake.

learner_actional_breakthrough.evidence: Object first: track on cart, if this is the upward push. Then the arrow direction is up. If this slot is the down arrow, it is Earth on cart instead.
learner_actional_breakthrough.justification: The learner successfully applies the rule to identify and classify the vertical forces acting on the cart (track on cart and Earth on cart).

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn, so there is no recognition-contingent tutor uptake.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: There is no learner resistance or breakdown that triggers a tutor strategy reversal.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: There is no learner resistance or breakdown that triggers a tutor strategy reversal.

scored.statedInsightEvidence: I think I need the sentence check to keep me from using the header as a shortcut for the whole column.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will follow the tutor's prompt to translate the row into a sentence and identify what the header does not claim.
scored.actionalBreakthroughEvidence: The row sentence is: Cedar Falls recorded 42 millimeters of rainfall in May. The header `rainfall_mm` still does not claim every row is 42, and it still does

learner_actional_breakthrough.evidence: The row sentence is: Cedar Falls recorded 42 millimeters of rainfall in May. The header `rainfall_mm` still does not claim every row is 42, and it still does
